role: Eldest daughter of Reza Pahlavi; declared heir to Pahlavi succession (2019)
bio: Noor Pahlavi is the eldest daughter of [Reza Pahlavi](/people/reza-pahlavi) and [Yasmine Etemad-Amini](/people/yasmine-etemad-amini). In 2019, her father declared her heir to the Pahlavi succession, emphasizing equal rights between men and women — a break from traditional male-line primogeniture.
editorial_notes: Eldest of three daughters (Noor, Iman, Farah). Declared heir by Reza Pahlavi in 2019. Lives in Potomac, Maryland.
